metadata.note: Threshold sensitivity checks whether the OSM-derived pseudo-history pipeline is robust to segmentation and filtering choices. It is not a direct external-baseline comparison.

interpretation.strict_prototype_usable: True only when the data passes the stated strict reconstruction thresholds, including median route-distance ratio within [0.5, 2.0].
interpretation.exploratory_usable: True when the data is good enough for exploratory pseudo-history experiments under a looser route-distance ratio ceiling of 2.5. This should not be presented as clean per-user history.
interpretation.route_distance_ratio_note: Values above 2.0 suggest approximate map matching may overbuild routes even when GPS-to-route distance is low.
